arguments.text: Classic operations research problems often revolve around resource allocation or optimization. In the context of business, these issues are addressed through Business Intelligence Competency Centers (BICCs), which formulate a data strategy and identify use cases for data mining. BICCs can evolve into Analytics Competency Centers (ACCs) over time.

observation.summary:
1. Classic operations research problems focus on resource allocation or optimization.
2. In business, these issues are addressed through Business Intelligence Competency Centers (BICCs).
3. BICCs formulate a data strategy and identify use cases for data mining.
4. Over time, BICCs can evolve into Analytics Competency Centers (ACCs).
5. These centers aim to provide insights and solutions based on data analysis in the business context.

arguments.answer: Classic operations research problems focus on resource allocation or optimization. In business, these issues are addressed through Business Intelligence Competency Centers (BICCs). BICCs formulate a data strategy and identify use cases for data mining.

steps.final_answer: Classic operations research problems focus on resource allocation or optimization. In business, these issues are addressed through Business Intelligence Competency Centers (BICCs). BICCs formulate a data strategy and identify use cases for data mining.
